chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: 1238 - وَ رَوَى رِبْعِيُّ بْنُ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ وَ فُضَيْلُ بْنُ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «لَيْسَ فِي اَلسَّفَرِ جُمُعَةٌ وَ لاَ فِطْرٌ وَ لاَ أَضْحًى.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1238 - Rib'i ibn Abdullah and Fudayl ibn Yasar narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"There is no Jumu’ah prayer, Eid al-Fitr prayer, or Eid al-Adha prayer while traveling."
